title: Servier Acquires Day One for $2.5B
headline: French pharma Servier acquires US commercial-stage rare oncology biotech Day One for $2.5B, marking year's second-largest biotech M&A.
key_facts: $2.5 billion total acquisition value, $21.50 per share all cash, Second-largest biotech acquisition in 2026 YTD behind Gilead's $7.8B Arcellx deal

title: CBER Director Vinay Prasad to Depart FDA
headline: Controversial FDA CBER Director Vinay Prasad to leave FDA at end of April 2026, ending tumultuous term marked by vaccine guideline changes and rare disease drug controversies.
key_facts: CBER Director, Expected departure end of April 2026, Reworked vaccine guidelines, Controversial tenure on rare disease drugs

title: Lonza Divests Capsule Unit for $3B
headline: CDMO giant Lonza divests capsule and health ingredients unit to UK private equity firm Lone Star for $2.2B upfront in a $3 billion total deal.
key_facts: $3 billion total deal value, $2.2 billion upfront payment, Capsule and health ingredients business divestiture

title: J&J Tecvayli-Darzalex Combo Gets FDA Approval
headline: FDA issues speedy approval for Johnson & Johnson's Tecvayli (teclistamab) and Darzalex (daratumumab) combination in multiple myeloma.
key_facts: Tecvayli is bispecific antibody targeting BCMA and CD3, First-of-its-kind bispecific mechanism, Combined with Darzalex anti-CD38 antibody

title: Blackstone Invests $400M in Teva-Sanofi IBD
headline: Private equity giant Blackstone commits $400 million to support Teva and Sanofi's TL1A-targeted inflammatory bowel disease drug development.
key_facts: $400 million investment, TL1A pathway target for inflammatory bowel disease, Teva and Sanofi co-developers

title: Pfizer GLP-1 Approved in China
headline: Pfizer secures obesity drug approval in China for GLP-1 therapy following acquisition of rights from Chinese biotech Sciwind.
key_facts: GLP-1 weight loss drug, NMPA (China) approval, Acquired from Sciwind Chinese biotech, Weeks after rights acquisition
